title: × pyraria auricularis
intro:
× Pyraria auricularis is a hybrid species of plant, although it seems more accurate to refer to it as a cultivar of Pyraria, as the information available suggests it is not a naturally occurring species, and as a result I couldn't verify its origins. However, it does appear to be a type of vining plant.

This plant is often used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of × Pyraria auricularis are said to include reducing stress and promoting overall well-being due to its calming and soothing effects. 

Herbal preparations of × Pyraria auricularis are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea or by drying the leaves to make a herbal supplement.
